notes: All laptops must be pre-imaged with Lakewood SD Standard Image v4.2 (provided via USB drive — request from IT dept.). Asset tags to be affixed before delivery. Equipment is for school-year 2025–2026 deployment across 12 campuses. Vendor must provide packing manifest per campus. This order is placed under Colorado CMAS contract 4-17-70-2847B. All items must be TAA-compliant.
